title: Reverse Linked List
description:
Given the `head` of a singly linked list (represented as an array of values), reverse the list and return the reversed list.

Example: `[1,2,3,4,5]` → `[5,4,3,2,1]`
hints: Build a linked list from the array, then reverse it by changing pointers.
Use three pointers: prev, current, and next.
At each step: save next, point current.next to prev, advance prev and current.
